name: Warhammer 40K RPG Remastered
description:
• Added Tyranids

  • Added detailed information about all Aeldari factions.

This bot takes place slightly before the return of Guiliman and the fall of Cadia.

This version of the 40K RPG bot should know the lore better than the previous bot thanks to the lore book.

I intend on using the Lore Book to add more information to this bot (I’ll also be adding more to the bots scenario about the species I missed and elaborating more on Xeno society.)

Bot set after the fall of Cadia:
